description_long: This is a compact, square-shaped analog clock with a mint green plastic casing and a white face. The clock face features bold black Arabic numerals from 1 to 12, with black minute and hour hands and a gold-colored second hand. The front is protected by a clear cover, while the back is black with two adjustment knobs and a battery compartment, indicating it is battery-operated. The sides and top are smooth and rounded, with a small button or dial on the top surface. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for easy reading at a glance. Its lightweight build and small size make it ideal for placement on desks, bedside tables, or shelves.
description: A small, mint green, square analog clock with bold black numerals and three hands, encased in plastic with a simple, functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white clock face with black Arabic numerals, black hour and minute hands, and a gold second hand.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the smooth, rounded mint green plastic casing with no visible features except a slight top button outline.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a black back panel with two adjustment knobs, a battery compartment, and a speaker grille.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the smooth, rounded mint green casing.
attribute_face_design: Square white face with bold black Arabic numerals, black tick marks, and three central hands; minimalistic and easy to read.
